info.name: EcomAssignment - Node.js Microservices
info.description:
Complete API collection for all 5 Node.js microservices.

**Quick Start:**
1. Run `POST /api/auth/login` (UserService).
2. The test script auto-saves the token to the collection variable `token`.
3. All protected endpoints (Cart, Order) use that token automatically.

**Mock credentials:**
- john@example.com / password123
- jane@example.com / securepass456
- admin@example.com / admin123

request.description: Returns service health status. No auth required.
Login with email and password. The test script automatically stores the returned `token` in the `token` collection variable.
Invalidates the current token. Uses the `token` collection variable.

item.name: 04 - ProductService (port 5002)
item.description: No authentication required for any endpoint.

request.description: Fetches all products with pagination support. Default: page=1, pageSize=10. Max pageSize=200. Results are cached (if Redis is enabled).
Example: Get second page with 20 items per page.
Fetches a product by its integer ID. Results are cached (if Redis is enabled).

item.name: Get Product by ID - Not Found (404)

request.description:
Returns a hardcoded filters object:
- Sizes: S, M, L, XL, Free Size, 28, 30, 32, 34
- Colors: Black, Blue, Green, Grey, Pink, Red, White
- Ratings: 2, 3, 4, 5
- MinPrice: 0, MaxPrice: 10000
- Brands and Categories from DB
Returns full filter options with document counts per category, brand, color, and rating bucket.
Returns child categories for the given parentId.

item.name: 05 - SearchService (port 5003)
item.description:
No authentication required. Supports full-text + faceted search.

**sortBy values:** 0=RelevanceScore, 1=PriceLowHigh, 2=PriceHighLow, 3=Newest, 4=TopRated

request.description: Returns all products paginated with default sorting (RelevanceScore).
Demonstrates all filters combined: text query + category + price range + min rating + in-stock + sort by top rated.
